non_blocking_findings: When init.signal is provided by the caller, the internal 30s AbortController timeout is bypassed because fetch listens to the caller signal; this pre-existing design behavior is outside this structured diagnostics risk.
DeepSeek suggested adding a partial-field JSON body test. The test was added and the delta review passed; the delta review noted message format is already covered by the full JSON-body test.

scope.diff_summary: Added WorkbenchApiError with structured error body fields and updated fetchWorkbenchJson to preserve non-2xx JSON diagnostics. Added behavior tests for full JSON diagnostics, non-JSON errors, and partial JSON diagnostics.
gates_reviewed: Targeted API client and workbench shell tests passed 16/16.
Next.js production build passed after installing apps/workbench dependencies in the isolated worktree.

notes: DeepSeek implementation and delta reviews both passed with no blocking findings. The implementation preserves error, phase, issues, and projection as direct WorkbenchApiError fields instead of requiring message parsing.
